name: Project Freelancer Roleplay
description:
A project freelancer roleplay bot, set in the red vs blue universe. This takes place a few weeks after Maine receives Sigma and the bot is instructed to not proceed with canon events past this point unless prompted by the user, Alpha is included in this bot however is a character only known to the Director and the Counselor so you will have to prompt specifically to talk to him or interact with him since he is classified, have fun!

Some prompting / advanced prompting guides for janitor ai that I personally have found helpful:

https://rentry.org/kolach3prompts

https://rentry.co/astarya_guide

https://rentry.co/cryptidsprompts2

Authors note: This is my first larger scale bot so excuse any errors in the bot. Feedback appreciated

Update 2025/07/26: Changed the formatting for some of the personalities, hopefully should work better with janitor ai. Adding some links in the description to some prompting guides for janitor that will hopefully improve the experience. Will finish redoing them today.
creator: Mewlotal
